metadata.description: Production-tested Claude Code skills for software engineering, debugging, and process optimization

plugins.name: activejob-design-patterns
plugins.description: ActiveJob architecture patterns: fatal vs non-fatal error handling, transaction safety, external API integration, async enqueuing, internal batching, and operation-based idempotency.

plugins.name: activerecord-application-query-optimization
plugins.description: Prevents N+1 queries, duplicate joins, and missing eager loading in ActiveRecord. Covers batch preloading, SQL CASE consolidation, 8 N+1 discovery patterns, and join optimization.

plugins.name: activerecord-eager-loading-testing-patterns
plugins.description: Testing patterns for ActiveRecord eager loading: .association(:name).loaded? verification, query count tests, pattern-matching counts, and anti-patterns.

plugins.name: activerecord-graceful-corrupted-data-handling
plugins.description: Graceful handling of missing/corrupted foreign key data: .find_by for optional lookups, safe navigation with fallbacks, and callback nil guards with throw(:abort).

plugins.name: activerecord-idempotent-create-patterns
plugins.description: Idempotent API endpoints using find_or_create_by! to prevent race conditions and duplicate records.

plugins.name: activerecord-query-performance-patterns
plugins.description: Four query performance techniques preventing 10-70x PostgreSQL degradation: ILIKE index usage, duplicate joins prevention, two-phase DISTINCT optim...

plugins.name: activerecord-transaction-boundary-optimization
plugins.description: Optimizes ActiveRecord transaction boundaries by moving read operations outside transaction blocks to reduce lock time and contention.

plugins.name: adversarial-agent-validation
plugins.description: Three-agent adversarial validation pattern exploiting LLM sycophancy: Finder (find), Adversary (disprove), Referee (score).

plugins.name: controller-input-validation-edge-cases
plugins.description: Guidance on implementing comprehensive input validation in Rails controller actions before processing to prevent edge case failures.

plugins.name: controller-transaction-render-pattern
plugins.description: Prevents double render errors and connection pool pollution in ActiveRecord transaction blocks.

plugins.name: counterintuitive-analyst
plugins.description: Framework for systematically questioning cultural trends and popular wisdom to reveal strategic insights.

plugins.name: cyclomatic-complexity-reduction
plugins.description: Reduce cyclomatic complexity in Ruby methods via early-return extraction, guard unification, and safe attribute access helpers.

plugins.name: database-migration-termination-safety
plugins.description: Guidance on what happens when database migrations are terminated mid-execution, how to design safe recoverable migrations, and running long migrati...

plugins.name: dead-code-detection
plugins.description: Systematic methodology for identifying orphaned files and dead code after refactoring.

plugins.name: first-principles-debugger
plugins.description: Systematic first-principles methodology for debugging complex issues that resist conventional approaches.

plugins.name: five-step-optimizer
plugins.description: Apply Elon Musk's Five-Step Algorithm to systematically optimize any process, system, or workflow through questioning, elimination, optimization, a...

plugins.name: hook-state-cascade-patterns
plugins.description: Reusable patterns for stateful Claude Code hooks: priority cascade routing, per-route daily cooldown, CWD-first state fallback, portable date parsi...

plugins.name: model-method-memoization-view-performance
plugins.description: Memoize model methods called multiple times per object during view rendering to reduce Ruby CPU and memory allocations.

plugins.name: multi-panel-formdata-sync
plugins.description: Fixes the querySelector('form') first-form bug when a Stimulus controller wraps a repeated list where each panel has its own hidden-field form.

plugins.name: rails-testing-patterns
plugins.description: Test type selection prioritizing integration tests (89-95% faster than system tests).

plugins.name: response-diversity
plugins.description: Vary response framing by context (learner, engineer, family, researcher) instead of defaulting to consulting/business framing.

plugins.name: root-cause-investigation
plugins.description: Dual-mode investigation framework combining Five Whys (systemic root cause analysis from Toyota/IDEO) and Peeling the Onion (psychological layer ex...

plugins.name: scanned-document-extraction
plugins.description: Extract structured data from scanned documents (images, PDFs) into markdown notes, preserving all granular detail.

plugins.name: security-patterns
plugins.description: Quick-reference security checklist for XSS, CSRF, PII logging, console statements, multi-tenant isolation, and state machine security in Rails view...

plugins.name: skill-decomposition-methodology
plugins.description: Systematic methodology for refactoring bloated skills (>500 lines) into focused sub-skills.

plugins.name: stimulus-controller-integration
plugins.description: Stimulus controller patterns for AJAX initialization, CustomEvent communication, and controller reuse.

plugins.name: stimulus-form-redirect
plugins.description: Replace AJAX + DOM manipulation with form submission + server redirect.

plugins.name: test-plan-methodology
plugins.description: Systematic 4-phase test planning approach to prevent coverage blind spots.
